AcceptAgreement.description: Grants permission to accept an AWS agreement that has not yet been accepted by the customer account

AcceptNdaForAgreement.description: Grants permission to accept the terms of an NDA Document for a given agreement resource

GetAccountSettings.description: Grants permission to get the account settings for Artifact

GetAgreement.description: Grants permission to get an AWS agreement that has not yet been accepted by the customer account

GetCustomerAgreement.description: Grants permission to get an AWS agreement that has been accepted by the customer account

GetNdaForAgreement.description: Grants permission to retrieve the NDA Document for a given agreement resource

GetReport.description: Grants permission to download a report

GetReportMetadata.description: Grants permission to download metadata associated with a report

GetTermForReport.description: Grants permission to download a term associated with a report

ListAgreements.description: Grants permission to list AWS agreements

ListCustomerAgreements.description: Grants permission to list customer-agreement resources that have been accepted by the customer account

ListReportVersions.description: Grants permission to list report versions in your account

ListReports.description: Grants permission to list reports in your account

PutAccountSettings.description: Grants permission to put account settings for Artifact

TerminateAgreement.description: Grants permission to terminate a customer agreement that was previously accepted by the customer account

artifact:ReportCategory.description: Filters access by which category reports are associated with

artifact:ReportSeries.description: Filters access by which series reports are associated with
